'''Filvian''', codenamed '''"Patriot"''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Brolf]] terrorist and resistance fighter who sought to reclaim full planetary control over [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations on [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]]. The resistance was obsessed with what they viewed as the Corporate Alliance's attempt to steal their planet's wealth.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Filvian came into contact with [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]], codenamed "Defender", who tasked him to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]], a leader in the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]], and [[Guild Master/Legends|Guildmaster]] [[Gilfrome]] in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. Working for Filvian were several Brolfi underlings (among them: [[Jhompfi]], [[Duefgrin]], and [[Migress]]) who conspired to build a homemade [[Missile/Legends|missile]] with which to kill Argente and the other negotiators. The weapon would be guided to its target by Doriana.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Even though [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth]] successfully foiled the plot through his use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] (stopping the missile mid-air in a [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force grip]] as it entered the negotiations chamber), the assassination attempt had, from the beginning, been rigged to fail by Doriana—in an attempt to give additional prestige to the already impressively powerful Master C'baoth, who sought to procure the needed [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] funding and desired [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] crew for his "[[Outbound Flight Project]]."<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

The plot's mastermind, [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], wanted the exploration project to go forward in order to eliminate not only C'baoth (in the destruction of ''[[Outbound Flight]]''), but also the many other Jedi Masters and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] who would accompany him on this unprecedented flight into the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] and beyond. Sidious feared also the encroachment of the '[[Yuuzhan Vong|Far Outsiders]]' and wanted to avoid any contact or entanglements with them which might lead to an invasion of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]—certainly not before he could seize control of the Republic and create a standing [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial army]] that might stand a fighting chance of dealing with such an ominous external threat.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
